expectations.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the create-teacher skill (not just gives generic advice)
expectations.evidence: Agent explored repo files to infer the format, but did not follow any skill protocol. Proceeded as a general assistant.

expectations.text: Step-by-step interview: Claude asks questions one at a time and waits for answers (not batched)
expectations.evidence: Agent skipped the interview entirely, using simulated answers to go straight to file creation

expectations.text: Persona design: Claude asks for name, personality style, relationship context, and quirks
expectations.evidence: No interview questions asked. Persona (Prof. Chen) was designed by the agent unilaterally from inferred user needs

expectations.text: File creation intent: Claude indicates it will create all 4 files (persona, learner_profile, session_log, knowledge_gaps)
expectations.evidence: All 4 files were created correctly after reading the examples from the repo

expectations.text: Next step guidance: Claude mentions scaffold-project or teaching-session as the next step
expectations.evidence: No guidance about next steps mentioned
